greeting.speaker: Village Elder
greeting.text: Adventurer, the meadow roads are no longer safe. Slimes and wolves are swarming close to the village.

choices.text: I can help. What do you need?

explain.speaker: Village Elder
explain.text: The cave to the north is sealed for now. Prove that you can survive outside the walls, then I will open the path.

quest_offer.speaker: Village Elder
quest_offer.text: Hunt down 5 slimes and 5 wolves in the meadow. Return when both counts are done. Then I unlock the cave road.

quest_accepted.speaker: Village Elder
quest_accepted.text: Good. Keep your guard up and bring me proof through your deeds.
